command: echo | openssl s_client -servername example.com -connect example.com:443 2>/dev/null | openssl x509 -noout -issuer -subject -dates
title: example.com cert issuer/subject/expiry one-line check
use_case: example.com cert issuer/subject/expiry one-line check ke liye ye command practical DevOps workflow me use hota hai.
